rulings.Case Title: BLAIR VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: (1) Allstate'S Motion To Vacate Order Compelling Appraisal (2) Pltf'S Appraisal Hearing Re Appraisal Issues
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE - DENY, POLICY LIMITS ARE DISPUTED AND DEFENDANT'S TENDER WAS PREDICATED UPON A RELEASE. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: BLAIR VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Determiantion Of Appraisal Issues
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF APPRAISAL ISSUES - GRANT, APPRAISERS TO DETERMINE ACTUAL CASH VALUE OR AMOUNT OF LOSS DUE TO FIRE ONLY. ISSUES RE DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH OR SPITERI'S DERELICTION WILL BE DECIDED IN COURT. COURT WILL LIFT STAY ONCE APPRAISAL COMPLETE. (PB)

rulings.Rulings: DENY VARIAN MEDICAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN RE NEGLIGENT HIRING OF CONTRACTORS OTHER THAN PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER. SEE CARMARGO V TJAARDA DAIRY (2001) 25 CAL.4TH 1235, 1243 DISCUSSING DISTINCTION AS ILLUSTRATED IN SMITH V. ACANDS, INC. (1994) 31 CAL.APP.4TH 77. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: KONG MING WONG VS. ALFONSO ANGULO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE PLAINTIFF'S DOMINANT MOTIVE. GRANT & DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. GRANT AS TO RETALIATION. DEFENSE INAPPLICABLE AS A MATTER OF LAW UNDER CC 1942.5(A). GRANT AS TO CREDIT FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT. NOT A DEFENSE. DENY AS TO REST. (PB)
